title: <div>I never got into a fistfight. Actually, a friend and I were trading Pokémon
content: I never got into a fistfight. Actually, a friend and I were trading Pokémon cards, and the gullible fool I am took sour trade and overnight soured to the trade. The following day I try to reverse the trade, what some would have referred to as Indian giving, and my friends would have none of the matter. He jumped on my back and tried to kill me. Our fathers talked.
context: From document: I never got into a fistfight. Actually, a friend and I were trading…
